title: Toolbox-Bridge Workstate feed (v1)
description: ScriptVault sidecar metadata derived from Bulwark findings in the Workstate snapshot, emitted by `toolbox-bridge` into Workstate's feeds directory for ScriptVault to consume. The bridge's only input is the Workstate snapshot and its only output is this feed — no direct tool-to-tool communication.
$comment: Modeled from crates/toolbox-bridge/src/feed.rs (SidecarFeed/SidecarRecord). Sidecar fields (`tags`, `desc`) use ScriptVault's own sidecar field names so ScriptVault can merge them with its usual sidecar-wins rules; the bridge only ever emits `risk:`/`owner:` tags.

schema_version.description: Integer major version. Bumped only on a breaking change.

generated_at.description: When the bridge generated this feed, as an RFC3339 timestamp.

source_generated_at.description: Bulwark's own generation stamp (RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD), carried through from the snapshot's findings section so consumers can judge the age of the underlying scan.

path.description: Absolute path of the script this sidecar metadata annotates.

tags.description: Bridge-managed tags, always prefixed `risk:` or `owner:`. ScriptVault keeps user tags untouched when merging.

desc.description: One-line description (max 200 chars of body) with a trailing `[RISK: …]` badge for medium/high/critical subjects.
